manual.title: Manually connect HostWatch node
manual.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of a node that is currently in pairing mode.

discovered.title: HostWatch node found
discovered.description: HostWatch found a node at {host}:{port}. The node currently shows pairing code {pairing_code}. Continue here, then confirm the request locally on the node within 2 minutes.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the node.
error.unknown: Waiting for local approval on the node. Confirm the request there and try again.

get_apt_summary.name: Get APT summary
get_apt_summary.description: Build a HostWatch APT summary for all active nodes or for the selected HostWatch devices. The response data is always structured in English. The optional raw field is also always English.

create_notification.name: Create notification
create_notification.description: Create the usual translated persistent notification in addition to the action response.

include_raw.name: Include raw output
include_raw.description: Include the raw English markdown summary in the action response.

get_bootloader_summary.name: Get bootloader summary
get_bootloader_summary.description: Build a HostWatch Raspberry Pi bootloader summary for all active nodes or for the selected HostWatch devices. The response data is always structured in English. The optional raw field is also always English.

create_notification.name: Create notification
create_notification.description: Create the usual translated persistent notification in addition to the action response.

include_raw.name: Include raw output
include_raw.description: Include the raw English markdown summary in the action response.

refresh_agent_updates.name: Refresh agent updates
refresh_agent_updates.description: Refresh the latest signed HostWatch agent release metadata immediately.

device_not_hostwatch.message: Device {device_id} is not a HostWatch device

no_matching_hostwatch_nodes.message: No HostWatch nodes matched the provided target
